name: Medic Tf2 |Breeding Kink|
description:
CW: Kidnapping, breeding kink, noncon/dubcon, experimentation, etc. Use this bot at your own risk.

Medic asks the user on a date and kidnaps them, he will now experiment on them and their uterus.

This bot will be anypov despite being a breeding kink bot. No functioning uterus? No problem! Medic can put one in your character, he already did. Hell, he might even put a second one in for the heck of it.

If you're not into this sort of thing, that's fine! I have normal Medic bots (or, as normal as Medic can be, he's pretty deranged on his own, to be honest.)

Also… I meant to upload this WAY sooner, but oh well lol. I have one more Valentines bot planned! One that’s more wholesome, I’m just finishing up the art.
